lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How are you today?

lines.speaker: Lensa
lines.text: **sigh**

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That good? Everyone around here seems a little depressed.

lines.speaker: Lensa
lines.text: **sigh**

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And not particularly talkative.

lines.speaker: Lensa
lines.text: **sigh**

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll leave you to your sighing. It looks like you have plenty to do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's a bit grey round here, isn't it?

lines.speaker: Lensa
lines.text: It gets you down after a while, you know. There are 273 shades of grey, you know, and we have them all.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's grey-t.

lines.speaker: Lensa
lines.text: That attempt at humour merely made me more depressed. Leave me alone.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How's the King treating you then?

lines.speaker: Lensa
lines.text: Like serfs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Serf?

lines.speaker: Lensa
lines.text: Yes, you know - peons, plebs, the downtrodden. He treats us like his own personal possessions.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You should leave this place.

lines.speaker: Lensa
lines.text: I keep trying to save up enough to leave, but the King keeps taxing us! We have no money left.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh dear.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Cheer up! It's not the end of the world.

lines.speaker: Lensa
lines.text: I'd prefer that, if it meant I didn't have to talk to people as inanely happy as you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Whoa! I think you need to get out more.
